name: Leland Astor
description: Originally from Canada. His special skill is piloting drones. He seems like a normal dumb middle school student, but has a complicated family situation which is kept secret. He is skilled at reading the room but never says his real intentions. His hobby is ego surfing.

name: Lügner
description: Lügner was a demon who served [Aura the Guillotine](https://anilist.co/character/219110/Aura).

name: Maika Tsuchimikado
description: [Motoharu’s](https://anilist.co/character/18926/Motoharu-Tsuchimikado) younger stepsister. She wears a maid attire as she goes to a Maid School to learn to become a maid and rides on top of a cleaning bot. She has a friendly relationship with Touma and knows that he has a girl living with him but keeps it a secret except to Tōma himself. Even though she lives in her school's dormitory, she sometimes go to live at her brother's apartment. (Source: Wikipedia)

name: Martel
description: Martel is one of the Chimeras that joined Greed to get revenge on the military for what was done to them in the 5th Laboratory. ~!She gets inside Alphonse's suit to make him unable to move when he gets captured by the Chimeras. She ends up developing a relationship with Alphonse, who tries to understand her motives unlike Ed. She is killed by Wrath right after taking shelter in his suit as she had done many times.!~

name: Masahito Karikiri
description: Masahito Karikiri is the chief priest of the Nitto Shrine located in the northern part of Hitogashima. ~!It is revealed later in the series that Masahito Karikiri is Shide and a human/shadow hybrid, allowing him to his armor made of shadows.!~

name: Maya Sakashiro
description: Maya Sakashiro was a student at Suruga Keijo Training School. She was ranked second in Suruga. She is the adoptive daughter of Ayako Sakashiro, Suruga's coach and headmaster. ~!Kaya Sakashiro is the alternative personality of Maya Sakashiro, who only emerges in a threatening situation that can't be handled by Maya. name: Meru Otonashi
description: A very shy girl who does not talk and only communicates via text messaging on her cell phone; she is notably and viciously abusive in her e-mails. Her family name, Otonashi, means "soundless", and her given name derives from the loan word "mail". Her e-mail address is "hazukashigariyasan", which means "full of shyness". name: Mikoto Asuka
description: Affiliation: Student Council Title(s): Student Council Vice-President A beautiful girl who is Suzaku High's brightest student. ~!She is the sixth witch and holds the invisibility power.!~

name: Minami Kaidou
description: Referred to as the "Academy's Princess," Minami who is a fourteen-year-old sophomore at Noble Academy as well as the student council president. She has a strong sense of responsibility, cares for others like a gentle sister, but can sometimes feel lonely. Her dream is to become a respectable person that can be useful to others. After meeting Pafu and Aroma, Minami became Cure Mermaid, the Princess of the Sea whose theme color is blue.

description: Mohammad Alai Jr is a rather kind person. He helped Kozue Matsumoto when she was crying. Later, he fell in love with her. But she really doesn't seem all that interested in him and she feels rather like a motherly figure towards Alai Jr. He is also a very determined person. He keeps getting back up even after horrible defeats. During his fights, Alai is arrogant and very serious. He claims he perfected his martial art. name: Murasaki
description: Murasaki is Imu's younger sister, born into a long line of evil shinobi, with a dark power known as the Root of Calamity. As a child, she had no desire to become a shinobi, and believed she didn't have what it takes. However, her father continued to push her to train, despite her protests. This eventually resulted in an incident where she tried to skip training, angering both her father and Imu. Out of irritation, Imu took her stuffed bear, Bebeby, and tried to rip its head off. name: Nasiens
description: Nasiens is a mysterious person Percival meets at Echo Gorge. Nasiens is a young person with short light brown hair and yellow eyes. Nasiens has a great interest in plants, wanting to be a herbalist like his adoptive grandfather Ordo was. He gets very excited when making new discoveries, liking to experiment with everything around him.
